name: Cheese and Crabmeat Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the bread and cheese.
2. Alternate layers of cheese, bread, and crabmeat (two times) in a buttered casserole dish.
3. Beat the eggs, milk, and melted butter together.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the layered ingredients.
5. Bake in a pan of water at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 to 1.5 hours.
6. Serve with sauce: 1 can of mushroom soup, undiluted and heated.
